properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 83/21

 1. ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT NAVAL OPERATIONS 1800 TO 0100 UTC DAILY 5 TO 14 JUL.
  MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS.

 AREA 1:
 A. 69-06.0N 15-38.3E
 B. 69-07.0N 15-40.2E
 C. 69-07.5N 15-40.3E
 D. 69-08.5N 15-39.5E
 E. 69-18.3N 15-11.1E
 F. 69-12.3N 14-57.7E
 G. 69-05.8N 15-34.0E
 H. 69-05.8N 15-37.0E
 I. 69-06.0N 15-38.3E


 AREA 2:
 A. 69-30.0N 15-32.4E
 B. 69-33.2N 15-56.0E
 C. 69-23.3N 16-06.7E
 D. 69-17.5N 16-01.4E
 C. 69-20.2N 15-43.3E
 D. 69-30.0N 15-32.4E
